page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr8i.3xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 12 dedicated physical cores using the Intel Xeon 6462C processor operating at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. The CPU allocation is dedicated with 1.0 thread per core, meaning hyperthreading is not enabled on this hardware configuration.

The instance is configured with 96.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include any local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring reliance on external network-attached storage for data persistence. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

The high memory-to-core ratio positions this instance as a memory-optimized resource. The dedicated physical cores without hyperthreading provide predictable compute performance, though the lack of local storage and GPU accelerators limits its use for local high-speed disk operations or hardware-accelerated machine learning. This profile is suitable for memory-intensive workloads, database caching layers, and enterprise applications requiring consistent CPU execution and high memory capacity.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr8i.3xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor. It features 12 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 6462C processor running at 3.3 GHz, with a dedicated CPU allocation and no hyperthreading. The system is equipped with 96.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It lacks local storage and GPU acceleration, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. This hardware configuration is designed for workloads requiring significant memory capacity and predictable single-threaded CPU performance, such as in-memory databases, caching layers, and enterprise applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr8i.3xlarge is a memory-optimized KVM instance with 12 dedicated Intel Xeon cores at 3.3 GHz, 96.0 GB of RAM, 10 Gbps network bandwidth, and no local storage.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated physical cores, high memory density, and baseline ten gigabit network connectivity.

96.0 GB of system memory with 8.0 GB per core
